scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,shell,shipper -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:shell" "npm run dev:shipper"
scripts.electron:dev: NODE_ENV=development npm run dev & sleep 4 && electron platform/electron/main.js
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --workspace=platform/shell && electron-builder --config platform/electron/electron-builder.yml --projectDir platform/electron
